xml.specific_character:
Vector ui_actor_portrets_gf2_vector
Vector gf2_vector isg stalker_terrain characters_voice\human\woman\ 15000 5000 -1 actors\gf2_vector\gf2_vector
[spawn] \n wpn_kriss_vector_vector \n ammo_11.43x23_fmj = 6 \n #include "gameplay\supplies\character_items.xml" #include "gameplay\supplies\character_food.xml" #include "gameplay\supplies\character_drugs_2.xml"
#include "gameplay\character_criticals.xml" gf2_vector_greet gf2_vector_misc gf2_vector_recruitment gf2_vector_dismiss actor_break_dialog
